_comment: Performance-review backlog — the parking lot for STRATEGY TRADING follow-ups: tweak ideas to revisit when more data lands, performance puzzles that need a second window, low-grade clusters worth investigating, comparisons to backtests/sweeps that prior sessions noticed but did not have enough evidence to propose as a Tier-3 change yet. The autonomous /performance-review skill drains this list every run: it triages each open item, acts on whatever the new window's data resolves, and either fires a proposed_tweaks[] entry, marks it resolved, or leaves it open with new evidence appended. Do NOT use this for system bugs (those go to health-review-backlog.json) or ML experiments (those go to ml-review-backlog.json). Item ids: PB-YYYYMMDD-NNN.

items.source: Investigation into the 4-hour trend_donchian short rejection cluster on 2026-05-27 03:50-05:24.
items.title: Validate post-clamp trend_donchian short fills on bybit_1 once PR (this branch) ships
items.description: PR fixes the negative-TP-from-50R-sentinel that hit every trend_donchian short at BTC ~$75k with risk ~$1500: tp = entry - 50*risk goes negative (e.g. 75644 - 50*1528 = -764), execute_pkg refuses 'without valid SL/TP', trade is journaled as exchange_rejected. Same code path in fade_breakout_4h + squeeze_breakout_4h. Clamp: tp = max(entry*0.01, entry - tp_r*risk). Next performance-review after merge + deploy should: (1) confirm the next trend_donchian short on bybit_1 actually fills (sized_qty > 0, no exchange_rejected), (2) eyeball the SL/TP shape on the live order to confirm tp>0 sentinel + sl above entry, (3) re-grade the post-clamp short cohort against the Chandelier trail's actual exit path (TP should never fill — trail is the exit). The bybit_2 side (rejected with sized_qty=0 from intent-mode at_target noop) is a SEPARATE issue and unaffected by this PR.
items.trigger_condition: Next /performance-review window after this Tier-3 PR merges + deploys, when trend_donchian (or fade/squeeze) has fired at least one fresh live short.
items.resolution_criteria: Window contains at least one bybit_1 trend_donchian short with status != exchange_rejected and a positive TP in the linked order package. Confirmed the trade journaled cleanly. If the same cluster recurs post-merge, the root cause is something other than the negative-TP guard and needs re-investigation.
